text: Late delivery resolution for São Paulo region: For delays >7 days, standard protocol is 15% refund + priority shipping on next order. This approach yields 87% customer satisfaction recovery rate.

Product quality mismatch resolution: When product does not match listing description, offer full return with prepaid shipping label + full refund OR replacement with expedited shipping. Document seller for quality review.
Payment dispute resolution: For credit card disputes, initiate chargeback reversal within 48 hours. For boleto overpayments, process refund to customer's bank account within 5 business days.

Repeat offender seller protocol: When a seller has >30% late delivery rate AND avg rating <3.0, flag for marketplace review. Offer affected customers 20% discount on next purchase from alternative seller.

Customer retention for multi-complaint customers: If customer has >2 complaints in 6 months, assign dedicated support agent and offer loyalty credit of R$50. Retention rate improves 34% with this approach.

Electronics category quality benchmark: Electronics products should maintain >3.5 avg review score. Categories below 3.0 trigger automatic seller quality audit. Current electronics avg: 2.9 (below threshold).
Regional delivery expectations: São Paulo metro delivers in 3-5 days. Rio metro in 4-6 days. Northeast region 7-12 days. North region (Manaus) 10-15 days. Set customer expectations accordingly.

Holiday season compensation policy: During November-January peak season, increase delay tolerance by 2 days before triggering compensation. However, maintain full compensation for delays >7 days regardless of season.
Defective product return process: Customer initiates return via portal. Seller must respond within 48 hours. If seller does not respond, marketplace auto-approves return and debits seller account.

Customer communication best practices: Always acknowledge the issue first, then provide specific timeline for resolution. Include order number in all communications. Follow up within 24 hours of resolution.
